name: Sweety Mahjong
author: Poki
description: Sweety Mahjong is a classic tile-matching puzzle game with a twist. The tiles now feature graphics of delicious sweets and snacks, so you can sate your eyes while exercising your brain and problem-solving skills. Can you finish all the tiles without letting all these sweets distract you? How to play: Select / Remove tile - Left mouse button About the creator: Sweety Mahjong is created by CodeThisLab.
